data.title: Sempra Infrastructure and JERA sign deal for 1.5Mtpa LNG from Port Arthur LNG Phase 2. 20-year agreement announced.
data.description: Today, in Houston, Sempra Infrastructure, a subsidiary of Sempra (SRE), and JERA Co., Inc. revealed a long-term deal spanning 20 years. This agreement details the supply of 1.5 million tonnes per annum (Mtpa) of liquefied natural gas (LNG) from the Port.

data.title: MPLX LP to buy Northwind Midstream for $2.375 billion, boosting Permian natural gas and NGL chains.
data.description: A company based in Findlay, Ohio, MPLX LP (NYSE: MPLX), revealed on July 31, 2025, its definitive agreement to purchase Northwind Delaware Holdings LLC (Northwind Midstream) for $2.375 billion in cash. This acquisition is subject to typical purchase price modifications.

data.title: Peabody reports strong Q2 results with accelerated mine start and favorable target changes. Net income disclosed.
data.description: In their second quarter report, Peabody (NYSE: BTU) announced robust performance in their seaborne and PRB costs, with the start of longwall operations at the Centurion Mine moved up to February 2026. This shift has led to favorable adjustments in full-year volume and cost goals. As of July 31, 2025, the company posted a notable increase in net income attributable, showcasing a positive trajectory for the future.

data.title: Namib Minerals, an African gold producer, provides corporate update after merging with Hennessy Capital Investment Corp. VI and listing on Nasdaq as NAMM.
data.description: Namib Minerals, an African gold producer, recently completed a business combination with Hennessy Capital Investment Corp. VI and is now listed on the Nasdaq Stock Exchange under the symbol NAMM. The company has mining and exploration assets in Zimbabwe and the Democratic Republic of Congo. Namib Minerals celebrated its listing by ringing the Closing Bell at the Nasdaq Stock Exchange on July 25, 2025.

data.title: Oxford Square Capital Corp. announces note offering on Jul 31, 2025. Price and terms TBD, with underwriters option for more.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, Greenwich-based Oxford Square Capital Corp. (NasdaqGS: OXSQ) launched a registered public offering for notes. The Company is in negotiations with underwriters to determine the public offering price and terms of the Notes. Additionally, Oxford Square Capital Corp. intends to give the underwriters a 30-day option to buy extra Notes under the same conditions to potentially cover over-allotments.

data.title: South Korea set to regulate leveraged crypto lending with new rules on caps, eligibility, and risk disclosures.
data.description: The anticipated guidelines will include specifications on leverage limits, qualifications for users, and disclosures of risks pertaining to crypto lending operations.
